free_text: A study of the gamma radiation produced in the alpha-
Gammas detected using NaI(Tl) crytal mounted
Beam energy calibrated using the 3492-keV resonance
See also CP-D/933. Error analysis revised in all subs.
Three types of targets used: tantalum oxide, tungsten
No information on source of uncertainties

composition determined by elastic scattering of
protons from the target surface; O/W ratio = 2.6 to
an accuracy of 10% on the oxygen content.
